title: shadow-utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[2:4.6-23]
- nss.c: shadow_logfd to stderr. Resolves: RHEL-83432
- pwck/grpck: only force nscd/sssd caches flush if anything was changed
  Resolves: RHEL-123912
full_text:
[2:4.6-23]
- nss.c: shadow_logfd to stderr. Resolves: RHEL-83432
- pwck/grpck: only force nscd/sssd caches flush if anything was changed
  Resolves: RHEL-123912

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23379.html
